intro: Paul AI GEO Analyzer helps you optimize your website for AI search and classic SEO. It provides actionable insights to improve your site's visibility and performance.

highlights.title: New Domain Overview
highlights.description: Easily see all analyzed pages of your website, sorted by those needing the most attention, so you can prioritize improvements.

highlights.title: Focus on Key Recommendations
highlights.description: Get a clear, actionable instruction on the most critical area to improve, helping you focus your efforts effectively.

highlights.title: User-Friendly Notifications
highlights.description: Switching pages now provides friendly guidance instead of error messages, making it easier to navigate the tool.

highlights.title: One-Click Fix Snippets
highlights.description: Quickly copy code snippets for recommended fixes, turning analysis into easy implementation without needing technical skills.

highlights.title: Enhanced Readability Scores
highlights.description: Understand how easy your content is to read with new readability scores, helping you create more engaging text.

highlights.title: Comprehensive Schema Validation
highlights.description: Ensure your content meets schema requirements, improving its chances of being understood and displayed correctly by search engines.

highlights.title: AI Citation Readiness Check
highlights.description: Assess how well your content can be cited by AI systems, enhancing its relevance in AI-driven searches.

highlights.title: International Language Support
highlights.description: Use the extension in your preferred language, making it accessible and user-friendly for a global audience.
